mapper.sql: id, global_seq, group_id, inviter_id, invite_reason, initial_members_json, delivery_status, expire_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_group_invite_notify WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM im_group_invite_notify WHERE inviter_id = #{inviterId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE im_group_invite_notify SET invite_reason = #{inviteReason}, initial_members_json = #{initialMembersJson}, delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_group_invite_notify WHERE expire_time <= #{currentTime} AND delivery_status IN (0, 1) -- 只处理未推送和待送达的状态
SELECT FROM im_group_invite_notify WHERE delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus} ORDER BY create_time DESC
